---
title: "Analysis Notebook"
description: "Analysis notebook for synthesis chapter — Ōkaro, deep stone piles Rotoiti, & Chapter "
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
fig-width: 8
fig-height: 6

execute:
  freeze: false
  cache: false
---

# Setup
```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

packages <- c("readr", "readxl", "tidyverse", "dplyr", "ggplot2", "patchwork")

quiet_load <- function(pkg) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE))
    suppressWarnings(suppressMessages(install.packages(pkg, dependencies = TRUE)))
  suppressPackageStartupMessages(require(pkg, character.only = TRUE, quietly = TRUE))
  invisible(TRUE)
}

options(repos = c(CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org"))
invisible(lapply(packages, quiet_load))

# Resolve chapter directory — works under knitr render, RStudio interactive, and CLI
chapter_dir <- local({
  f <- knitr::current_input(dir = TRUE)
  if (!is.null(f)) {
    p <- normalizePath(file.path(dirname(f), "06_synthesis"))
    return(if (dir.exists(p)) p else normalizePath(dirname(f)))
  }
  if (requireNamespace("rstudioapi", quietly = TRUE) && rstudioapi::isAvailable()) {
    f <- rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path
    if (nzchar(f)) return(normalizePath(dirname(f)))
  }
  normalizePath(".")  # fallback: assume CWD is 06_synthesis/
})
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = chapter_dir)

raw_dir  <- file.path(chapter_dir, "data", "raw")
der_dir  <- file.path(chapter_dir, "data", "derived")
out_dir  <- file.path(chapter_dir, "outputs")

dir.create(der_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Read raw Excel monitoring data
df_okaro_raw <- readxl::read_excel(file.path(raw_dir, "okaro_raw_data.xlsx"), sheet = "Monitoring_data")
df_okaro_Hobo_raw <- readxl::read_excel(file.path(raw_dir, "okaro_raw_data.xlsx"), sheet = "HOBO_Info")
df_deep_raw <- readxl::read_excel(file.path(raw_dir, "deep_stonepiles_raw_data.xlsx"), sheet = "Deep_monitoring")

# Save derived CSVs
write.csv(df_okaro_raw, file.path(der_dir, "Okaro_data.csv"),  row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(df_deep_raw,  file.path(der_dir, "Deep_data.csv"),   row.names = FALSE)

# Helper: read one HOBO logger CSV, standardise columns and parse datetime
read_hobo <- function(path) {
  readr::read_csv(path, skip = 1, show_col_types = FALSE) |>
    dplyr::select(ID = 1, DateTime = 2, DO_mg_L = 3, Temp_C = 4) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      DateTime = as.POSIXct(DateTime, format = "%m/%d/%y %I:%M:%S %p",
                             tz = "Pacific/Auckland")
    )
}

okaro_hobo <- file.path(raw_dir, "HOBO_loggers_okaro")
deep_hobo  <- file.path(raw_dir, "HOBO_loggers_deep")

# Ōkaro HOBO loggers
Site_1 <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  read_hobo(file.path(okaro_hobo, "DO_Logger_14_reef_122_291024.csv")),
  read_hobo(file.path(okaro_hobo, "DO_Logger_14_reef_122_131224.csv")),
  read_hobo(file.path(okaro_hobo, "DO_Logger_14_reef_122_090225.csv"))) |>
  dplyr::mutate(Site = "1 Stone pile") |>
  dplyr::filter(DateTime < as.POSIXct("2025-02-09", tz = "Pacific/Auckland"))

Site_2 <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  read_hobo(file.path(okaro_hobo, "DO_Logger_11_reef_123_291024.csv")),
  read_hobo(file.path(okaro_hobo, "DO_Logger_11_reef_123_131224.csv")),
  read_hobo(file.path(okaro_hobo, "DO_Logger_11_reef_123_280225.csv"))) |>
  dplyr::mutate(Site = "2 Stone pile") |>
  dplyr::filter(DateTime < as.POSIXct("2025-02-28", tz = "Pacific/Auckland"))

Site_3 <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  read_hobo(file.path(okaro_hobo, "DO_Logger_3_control_124_291024.csv")),
  read_hobo(file.path(okaro_hobo, "DO_Logger_3_control_124_131224.csv")),
  read_hobo(file.path(okaro_hobo, "DO_Logger_3_control_124_280225.csv"))) |>
  dplyr::mutate(Site = "3 Control") |>
  dplyr::filter(DateTime < as.POSIXct("2025-02-28", tz = "Pacific/Auckland"))

Okaro_do_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(Site_1, Site_2, Site_3)

# Deep stone piles HOBO loggers (Rotoiti)
Deep_do_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  read_hobo(file.path(deep_hobo, "DO_Logger_2_Deep_reef.csv")) |> dplyr::mutate(Logger = "2"),
  read_hobo(file.path(deep_hobo, "DO_Logger_3_Deep_reef.csv")) |> dplyr::mutate(Logger = "3"))

# 2025-11-24	DO logger deployment
# 2025-11-22	12:00:00am loggers recording start time
# 2026-01-15  Loggers 2 & 3 retrieved 

okaro_bathy <- (function(x) x$Ōkaro)(readRDS("C:/Users/or81/OneDrive - The University of Waikato/Documents/PhD/01_thesis_chapters/06_synthesis/data/raw/bathy_rasters.rds"))

okaro_buoy <- (function(x) x[x$Lake == "Okaro", ])(readRDS("C:/Users/or81/OneDrive - The University of Waikato/Documents/PhD/01_thesis_chapters/06_synthesis/data/raw/buoy_raw_data.rds"))


# Base plot theme
base_theme_bw <- theme_classic() +
  theme(
    text         = element_text(family = "sans", size = 11),
    axis.title   = element_text(face = "plain"),
    axis.text    = element_text(face = "plain"),
    plot.title   = element_text(face = "plain"),
    strip.text   = element_text(face = "plain"),
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.3)
  )
theme_set(base_theme_bw)

format_pval <- function(p, label = TRUE) {
  out <- if (p < 0.001) "< 0.001" else paste0("= ", format(round(p, 3), nsmall = 3))
  if (label) paste0("*p* ", out) else out
}
```

# Ōkaro stone piles — DO and temperature
```{r}
#| label: fig-okaro-raw-ts
#| fig-cap: "Raw dissolved oxygen and temperature time series from Ōkaro HOBO loggers."

rawplot1<-ggplot(Okaro_do_data, aes(x = DateTime, y = Temp_C, colour = Site)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(x = "Date", y = "Temperature (°C)", colour = "Site")

rawplot2<-ggplot(Okaro_do_data, aes(x = DateTime, y = DO_mg_L, colour = Site)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(x = "Date", y = "DO (mg L⁻¹)", colour = "Site")

okaro_raw_ts<-rawplot1/rawplot2
okaro_raw_ts
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-okaro-combined
#| fig-cap: "Daily mean water temperature (top) and dissolved oxygen (bottom) at Ōkaro stone pile, control sites, and the lake buoy. Period: 2024-09-11 to 2025-02-27."
#| fig-height: 6


# Field spot measurements (black points)
spot_measurements <- data.frame(
  Date = as.Date(c("2024-10-29", "2025-02-28")),
  Temp = c(12.8, 22.6),
  DO   = c(13.63, 4.63)
)

# Logger daily means
logger_daily <- Okaro_do_data |>
  dplyr::mutate(Date = as.Date(DateTime)) |>
  dplyr::group_by(Date, Source = Site) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    Temp = mean(Temp_C,  na.rm = TRUE),
    DO   = mean(DO_mg_L, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop")

# Buoy daily means
buoy_daily <- okaro_buoy |>
  dplyr::filter(
    DptSns >= 1,
    DateTime >= as.POSIXct("2024-09-11"),
    DateTime <= as.POSIXct("2025-02-27")) |>
  dplyr::mutate(Date = as.Date(DateTime)) |>
  dplyr::group_by(Date) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    Temp = mean(TmpWtr, na.rm = TRUE),
    DO   = mean(DOconc, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop") |>
  dplyr::mutate(Source = "Buoy")

okaro_combined <- dplyr::bind_rows(logger_daily, buoy_daily)

p_temp <- ggplot(okaro_combined, aes(x = Date, y = Temp, colour = Source)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(data = spot_measurements, aes(x = Date, y = Temp),
             inherit.aes = FALSE, colour = "black", size = 2.5) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Temperature (°C)", colour = NULL)

p_do <- ggplot(okaro_combined, aes(x = Date, y = DO, colour = Source)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(data = spot_measurements, aes(x = Date, y = DO),
             inherit.aes = FALSE, colour = "black", size = 2.5) +
  labs(x = "Date", y = "DO (mg L⁻¹)", colour = NULL)

okaro_combined_plot <- p_temp / p_do + patchwork::plot_layout(guides = "collect")
okaro_combined_plot

ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "fig-okaro-combined.png"), okaro_combined_plot, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)

```

# Deep stone piles — Rotoiti
```{r}
#| label: fig-deep-ts
#| fig-cap: "DO and temperature from deep stone pile loggers in Lake Rotoiti."

deepraw1<-ggplot(Deep_do_data, aes(x = DateTime, y = Temp_C, colour = Logger)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(x = "Date", y = "Temperature (°C)", colour = "Logger")

deepraw2<-ggplot(Deep_do_data, aes(x = DateTime, y = DO_mg_L, colour = Logger)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(x = "Date", y = "DO (mg L⁻¹)", colour = "Logger")

deep_raw <- deepraw1/deepraw2
deep_raw

```

```{r}
#| label: fig-deep-daily
#| fig-cap: "Daily mean dissolved oxygen and temperature at deep stone piles."

daily_means <- Deep_do_data |>
  dplyr::mutate(Date = as.Date(DateTime)) |>
  dplyr::group_by(Date, Logger) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    DO_mean   = mean(DO_mg_L, na.rm = TRUE),
    Temp_mean = mean(Temp_C,  na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups   = "drop"
  )

deepdaily1 <- ggplot(daily_means, aes(x = Date, y = Temp_mean, colour = Logger)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  labs(x = "Date", y = "Temperature (°C)", colour = "Logger")

deepdaily2 <- ggplot(daily_means, aes(x = Date, y = DO_mean, colour = Logger)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  labs(x = "Date", y = "DO (mg L⁻¹)", colour = "Logger")

deep_daily <- deepdaily1/deepdaily2
deep_daily

```


# Combined monitoring — Chapter 3 shoreline habitats + Chapter 5 stone piles
```{r}
#| label: combined-monitoring-load

root_dir <- dirname(chapter_dir)

ch3_raw <- readr::read_csv(file.path(root_dir, "03_koura_shoreline_habitats", "data", "derived", "Monitoring_CPUE_data.csv"))
ch3_fish <- readr::read_csv(file.path(root_dir, "03_koura_shoreline_habitats", "data", "derived", "Fish_data.csv"))

ch5_raw <- readr::read_csv(file.path(root_dir, "05_stone_piles_rotoiti", "data", "derived", "Combined_data.csv"))
ch5_fish <- readr::read_csv(file.path(root_dir, "05_stone_piles_rotoiti", "data", "derived", "Fish_data.csv"))


# Bind for comparison — keep Rotoiti from ch3 separately for direct lake match
combined_raw <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  ch3_raw |> dplyr::mutate(chapter = "Ch3"),
  ch5_raw |> dplyr::mutate(chapter = "Ch5"))

combined_fish <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  ch3_fish |> dplyr::mutate(chapter = "Ch3"),
  ch5_fish |> dplyr::mutate(chapter = "Ch5"))
```


```{r}

combined_fish <- combined_fish |>
  dplyr::mutate(net_bait = dplyr::case_when(net_type == "Box" & chapter == "Ch3" ~ "Box + trout", net_type == "Box" & chapter == "Ch5" ~ "Box + catfish", TRUE ~ "Fyke" ))

ggplot(combined_fish |> filter(species == "Kōura", !is.na(sex)),
       aes(length_mm, weight_g, col = sex)) +
        geom_point()+
        geom_smooth()

ggplot(combined_fish |> filter(species == "Kōura", !is.na(sex)),
       aes(length_mm, fill = sex)) +
  geom_histogram(position = "dodge")


ggplot(combined_fish |> filter(species == "Kōura", !is.na(sex)),
       aes(length_mm, fill = sex)) +
  geom_histogram(position = "dodge") +
  facet_grid(~ net_bait)


```


# nets efficiency Rotoiti
```{r}
# Total kōura caught per box type
rotoiti_filter <- function(df) {
  df |> filter(chapter == "Ch5" | (chapter == "Ch3" & as.numeric(site_id) %in% 73:84))
}

koura_summary <- combined_fish |>
  rotoiti_filter() |>
  filter(species == "Kōura") |>
  group_by(net_bait) |>
  summarise(total_koura = sum(amount, na.rm = TRUE))

net_summary <- combined_fish |>
  rotoiti_filter() |>
  distinct(net_bait, site_id, monitoring_id, amount_nets) |>
  group_by(net_bait) |>
  summarise(total_nets = sum(amount_nets, na.rm = TRUE))

left_join(net_summary, koura_summary, by = "net_bait") |>
  mutate(cpue = total_koura / total_nets)






# Sex and size comparison between net types 
koura_data <- combined_fish |>
  #rotoiti_filter() |>
  filter(species == "Kōura", !is.na(sex), sex != "Unknown")

# --- Sex bias: proportion male/female per net type ---
sex_counts <- koura_data |>
  group_by(net_bait, sex) |>
  summarise(n = sum(amount, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

sex_counts

# Chi-squared test: does sex ratio differ between net types?
sex_matrix <- sex_counts |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = sex, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) |>
  tibble::column_to_rownames("net_bait") |>
  as.matrix()

chisq.test(sex_matrix)

ggplot(koura_data, aes(net_type, length_mm, fill = net_bait)) +
  geom_boxplot() 

# Wilcoxon test: does size differ between net types?
size_trout   <- koura_data |> filter(net_bait == "Box + trout")   |> pull(length_mm)
size_catfish <- koura_data |> filter(net_bait == "Box + catfish") |> pull(length_mm)

wilcox.test(size_trout, size_catfish)


```



```{r}

ggplot(koura_data, aes(date_time_out, berried)) +
  geom_point() 


repro <- koura_data |>
  filter(sex == "F") |>
  mutate(
    date       = as.Date(date_time_out),
    month      = lubridate::floor_date(date, "month"),
    has_eggs   = !is.na(berried) & berried > 0,
    has_youngs = !is.na(youngs)  & youngs  > 0
  )

# Monthly proportion of females in each reproductive stage
monthly_repro <- repro |>
  group_by(month) |>
  summarise(
    n            = n(),
    pct_eggs     = mean(has_eggs)   * 100,
    pct_youngs   = mean(has_youngs) * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(c(pct_eggs, pct_youngs),
                      names_to  = "stage",
                      values_to = "pct") |>
  mutate(stage = dplyr::recode(stage,
    pct_eggs   = "Eggs (berried)",
    pct_youngs = "Young carries"))

ggplot(monthly_repro, aes(x = month, y = pct, colour = stage)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(aes(size = n)) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 6), guide = "none") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "% of females caught", colour = NULL)

```
